title: MGN 658 (M+F) Amendment 1 (Control of Noise at Work) Regs 2007
body: "Notice to all Ship and Fishing Vessel Owners, Ship Operators, Charterers, Managers, Skippers and other Employers of Seafarers, Masters, Chief Engineers, Officers, Ratings and other workers on merchant ships, crew of fishing vessels, Small Commercially Operated Vessels, Yachts with paid Crew and self-employed persons working on board: Classification Societies, Certifying Authorities, Test Houses and Competent Persons.    This notice should be read in conjunction with MGN 636 (M) Amendment 4 which provides details and guidance on interpretation of the Merchant Shipping and Fishing Vessel (Health and Safety at Work) Regulations 1997, MGN 587 (F) Amendment 1 (in respect of Fishing Vessels) and the Merchant Shipping and Fishing Vessels (Control of Noise at Work) Regulations 1997, MGN 447 (M+F) Amendment 4 Merchant Shipping and Fishing Vessel (Control of Noise at Work) Regulations 1997 Procedure for Seeking Exemptions and replaces MGN 352 (M+F) Amendment 1 The Merchant Shipping and Fishing Vessels (Control of Noise at Work) Regulations 2007 and MGN 377 (M+F) Sound Advice – Noise at Work from Music and Entertainment. "
